name: Life Choices 2: Life Simulator
author: Poki
description: Life Choices 2: Life Simulator is a simulation game where every decision shapes a unique story! Return to Unicoville with improved graphics, new characters, and deeper storylines. Step into the lives of its quirky citizens, complete their 3 main tasks, and uncover surprising secrets along the way. With every choice you make, their future changes. Ready to guide their fate? How to play Life Choices 2: Life Simulator? Click to select a character and select an option! Who created Life Choices 2: Life Simulator? Life Choices 2: Life Simulator is created by Unico Studio.
